requirement_topic.en: EMC — DOSM IEC-based MS Standards / Supplier Declaration of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容 — DOSM基于IEC的MS标准 / 供应商符合性声明
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容 — DOSM基於IEC的MS標準 / 供應商符合性聲明

summary.en: Laos does not have a dedicated standalone EMC directive equivalent to the EU EMC Directive or a general horizontal EMC law. EMC requirements for wireless and information technology equipment are addressed through DOSM IEC-based MS standards (Lao national standards) derived from IEC/CISPR standards. For IT and wireless equipment, the relevant IEC/CISPR base standards include CISPR 32 (Multimedia equipment — electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — limits and methods of measurement) and CISPR 35 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — immunity requirements). DOSM may accept supplier declaration of conformity (SDoC) supported by test reports from accredited laboratories as a market-access mechanism for lower-risk product categories, but mandatory third-party testing requirements should be confirmed with DOSM for each product type. Laos has no horizontal RoHS equivalent — the lane instruction is to say so plainly.
summary.zh: 老挝没有相当于欧盟EMC指令的专门独立EMC法规或通用水平EMC法律。无线和信息技术设备的电磁兼容要求通过DOSM基于IEC的MS标准（老挝国家标准，源自IEC/CISPR标准）加以规范。对于IT和无线设备，相关IEC/CISPR基础标准包括CISPR 32（多媒体设备——电磁干扰特性——限值和测量方法）和CISPR 35（多媒体设备的电磁兼容——抗扰度要求）。DOSM可能接受辅以认可实验室检测报告的供应商符合性声明（SDoC）作为较低风险产品类别的市场准入机制，但各产品类型的强制性第三方检测要求应与DOSM确认。老挝没有水平性RoHS等效规定——如实说明。
summary.zht: 寮國沒有相當於歐盟EMC指令的專門獨立EMC法規或通用水平EMC法律。無線和信息技術設備的電磁相容要求通過DOSM基於IEC的MS標準（寮國國家標準，源自IEC/CISPR標準）加以規範。對於IT和無線設備，相關IEC/CISPR基礎標準包括CISPR 32（多媒體設備——電磁干擾特性——限值和測量方法）和CISPR 35（多媒體設備的電磁相容——抗擾度要求）。DOSM可能接受輔以認可實驗室檢測報告的供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）作為較低風險產品類別的市場准入機制，但各產品類型的強制性第三方檢測要求應與DOSM確認。寮國沒有水平性RoHS等效規定——如實說明。

standards_or_laws: Lao PDR DOSM MS standards (IEC/CISPR-based) — EMC for information technology and wireless equipment
CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment; electromagnetic disturbance characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (IEC base standard)
CISPR 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment; immunity requirements (IEC base standard)
Note: Laos has no horizontal RoHS equivalent as of mid-2026

summary.en: In China, EMC requirements for wireless and IT equipment are governed by GB 9254 series (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement, based on CISPR 22/32) and GB/T 17618 (Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement, based on CISPR 24/35). For wireless devices specifically, GB 9254.1-2021 and related standards apply. Compliance with these standards is mandatory for IT equipment subject to CCC under CNCA-C17-01, and for wireless equipment, SRRC type-approval also addresses interference requirements. China's approach uses mandatory GB EMC standards enforced through SAMR and MIIT.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线和信息技术设备的电磁兼容要求由GB 9254系列（信息技术设备——无线电干扰特性——限值和测量方法，基于CISPR 22/32）和GB/T 17618（信息技术设备——抗扰度特性——限值和测量方法，基于CISPR 24/35）规范。对于无线设备，GB 9254.1-2021及相关标准适用。依据CNCA-C17-01须进行CCC认证的信息技术设备须强制符合上述标准，对于无线设备，SRRC型号核准亦涵盖干扰要求。中国采用由市场监管总局和工业和信息化部执行的强制性GB EMC标准方法。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線和信息技術設備的電磁相容要求由GB 9254系列（信息技術設備——無線電干擾特性——限值和測量方法，基於CISPR 22/32）和GB/T 17618（信息技術設備——抗擾度特性——限值和測量方法，基於CISPR 24/35）規範。對於無線設備，GB 9254.1-2021及相關標準適用。依據CNCA-C17-01須進行CCC認證的信息技術設備須強制符合上述標準，對於無線設備，SRRC型號核准亦涵蓋干擾要求。中國採用由市場監管總局和工業和信息化部執行的強制性GB EMC標準方法。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment; radio disturbance characteristics; Part 1: Class B equipment (SAMR, based on CISPR 32)
GB/T 17618 — Information technology equipment; immunity characteristics; limits and methods of measurement (SAMR, based on CISPR 24/35)
SRRC type-approval — includes radio interference requirements (MIIT/SRRC)

gap.en: The main gaps are: (1) No standalone Lao EMC law — EMC requirements derive from DOSM MS standards whose mandatory status for each wireless/IoT product category must be confirmed with DOSM/MEM. (2) Chinese GB EMC test reports (to GB 9254/GB 17618) may be accepted by DOSM as supporting evidence given the common IEC/CISPR base, but this is not guaranteed and should be verified per product. (3) Laos has no horizontal RoHS equivalent — there is no Lao restriction on hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment analogous to EU RoHS 2 or China's SJ/T 11363 / GB/T 26572 regime. Manufacturers do not need to file a Lao RoHS-style declaration. (4) SDoC acceptability and accredited laboratory recognition should be confirmed with DOSM before shipment.
gap.zh: 主要差距包括：（1）老挝没有独立的EMC法律——EMC要求源自DOSM MS标准，各无线/物联网产品类别的强制性须与DOSM/MEM确认。（2）鉴于共同的IEC/CISPR基础，中国GB EMC检测报告（依据GB 9254/GB 17618）可能被DOSM作为佐证材料接受，但不保证，须逐产品核实。（3）老挝没有水平性RoHS等效规定——老挝没有相当于欧盟RoHS 2或中国SJ/T 11363 / GB/T 26572制度的电气电子设备危险物质限制规定。制造商无需提交老挝式RoHS声明。（4）SDoC可接受性及认可实验室认可情况应在出货前与DOSM确认。
gap.zht: 主要差距包括：（1）寮國沒有獨立的EMC法律——EMC要求源自DOSM MS標準，各無線/物聯網產品類別的強制性須與DOSM/MEM確認。（2）鑑於共同的IEC/CISPR基礎，中國GB EMC檢測報告（依據GB 9254/GB 17618）可能被DOSM作為佐證材料接受，但不保證，須逐產品核實。（3）寮國沒有水平性RoHS等效規定——寮國沒有相當於歐盟RoHS 2或中國SJ/T 11363 / GB/T 26572制度的電氣電子設備危險物質限制規定。製造商無需提交寮國式RoHS聲明。（4）SDoC可接受性及認可實驗室認可情況應在出貨前與DOSM確認。

mandatory_status.target: EMC mandatory status via DOSM MS standards — depends on MEM/DOSM regulatory instrument for each product category; no horizontal RoHS in Laos
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 series under CNCA-C17-01 CCC for IT equipment; SRRC type-approval includes radio interference requirements (MIIT)

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology (DOSM), Ministry of Science and Technology, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Laos has no dedicated EMC directive; EMC requirements derive from DOSM IEC/CISPR-based MS standards with mandatory status to be confirmed per product category. Chinese GB EMC reports may provide supporting evidence given the shared IEC/CISPR base but are not automatically accepted. Laos has no horizontal RoHS equivalent — no hazardous substance restriction filing is required under a Lao RoHS framework. Verified: false — confirm current DOSM/MEM requirements before relying on this row.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝没有专门的EMC法规；EMC要求源自DOSM基于IEC/CISPR的MS标准，强制性须逐产品类别确认。鉴于共同的IEC/CISPR基础，中国GB EMC报告可作为佐证，但不自动被接受。老挝没有水平性RoHS等效规定——无需依据老挝RoHS框架提交危险物质限制申报。已核实：否——在依赖本行内容前，请确认DOSM/MEM当前要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國沒有專門的EMC法規；EMC要求源自DOSM基於IEC/CISPR的MS標準，強制性須逐產品類別確認。鑑於共同的IEC/CISPR基礎，中國GB EMC報告可作為佐證，但不自動被接受。寮國沒有水平性RoHS等效規定——無需依據寮國RoHS框架提交危險物質限制申報。已核實：否——在依賴本行內容前，請確認DOSM/MEM當前要求。
